title: Cherry Pink Netherite and Elytra
description: Cherry Pink Netherite and Elytra (Programmer Art)
body:
Adds pink cherry style programmer art textures for Netherite Tools; Netherite Armour; Netherite Trims; Bow and the Elytra. May look jarring with default textures, but give it a go! I will not be adding a Spear Texture becuase I do not personally use the item.

**Reccomended Texture Packs, not required.**

[Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) - Used in Screenshots.

[Golden Days](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/golden-days) - Alternative to the above.

[Sweet Sweet HUD!!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/sweet-sweet-hud) and [Pink Sweet GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pinksweet-gui) - Used in screenshots.

[Cat Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cat-crosshair) - Used in screenshots.

[Pink Enchantment Glint](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pink-enchantment-glint) - Used in Screenshots.

**Shader in Screenshots**
[Complimentary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) with [Euphoria Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/euphoria-patches)
